text:
Once upon a time, in a magical forest shrouded in mist, there lived a wise old owl named Oliver.

Every morning, Oliver would glide gracefully through the leaves, searching the skies for clues about the enchanted forest’s secrets. One day, as he soared high above, he heard the sweet melody of a flute. Intrigued, he fluttered down and discovered a charming sprite playing beneath a willow tree.

“Greetings, tiny flute player,” said Oliver. “Are you here to entertain?”

The sprite nodded enthusiastically. “Yes! I’m Marina. I’d love to show you my beautiful flute!”

Oliver accepted Marina’s invitation. They played for hours, creating wondrous sounds that filled the forest.

One day, while listening to Marina play, Oliver learned of an ancient secret. A long time ago, a brave squirrel had discovered a hidden melody that could restore balance to the forest.
